wikipedia-omit:View Boston.notes: View Boston is a commercial observation deck attraction on the upper floors of the Prudential Tower. It does not have a standalone Wikipedia article; it is only referenced within the Prudential Tower article as a branded commercial experience that replaced the former Skywalk Observatory.
